methods.description: Sampling of 37 diatom species, the bolidophyte Triparma pacifica, and two pelagophyte outgroups to cover the known breadth of extant phylogenetic diversity.

steps.description: We sampled 37 diatom species that spanned the known breadth of extant phylogenetic diversity, the bolidophyte Triparma pacifica, and two pelagophyte outgroups.
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples of 37 diatom species, Triparma pacifica, and two pelagophyte outgroups

methods.description: Process of filtering and assembling RNA-seq reads using the Oyster River Protocol, including error correction, quality trimming, and filtering for laboratory vectors and rRNA genes.

steps.description: RNA-seq reads were filtered and assembled following the basic guidelines outlined in the Oyster River Protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: filter and assemble RNA-seq reads using Oyster River Protocol

steps.description: Raw sequence reads were corrected with Rcorrector.
steps.searchable_summary: correct raw sequence reads using Rcorrector

steps.description: Corrected and trimmed reads were filtered for common laboratory vectors and diatom rRNA genes using bowtie2 (ver. 2.2.3).
steps.searchable_summary: filter reads for vectors and rRNA genes using bowtie2
